claims.comparison_population: Type-2-high asthma vs Type-2-low asthma/other phenotypes
claims.supporting_quote: Around half of asthma patients are 'Type-2-high' asthma with overexpression of type 2 inflammatory pathways and elevated type 2 cytokines. ... ILC2 followed by Th2 cells produces a series of cytokines such as IL-4, IL-5, and IL-13.

coverage_notes: Manually grounded by Claude reading Stage3b abstracts directly (no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY available for automated Stage4b in this environment).
